args.content:
# Simple Multi-File Python Project

This project consists of the following files:
- `main.py`: The entrypoint of the application.
- `app/model.py`: Contains the business logic.
- `app/controller.py`: Connects the model and view.
- `app/view.py`: Contains a simple CLI interface.

To run the application, execute the following command in your terminal:

```bash
python main.py
```

# Simple Multi-File Python Project

This project consists of the following files:
- `main.py`: The entrypoint of the application.
- `app/model.py`: Contains the business logic.
- `app/controller.py`: Connects the model and view.
- `app/view.py`: Contains a simple CLI interface.

To run the application, execute the following command in your terminal:

```bash
python main.py
```
